case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC VS REVELO, ANSELMO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,553.79 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC AS TO DEFENDANT REVELO, ANSELMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REVELO, ANSELMO
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY REVELO, ANSELMO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REVELO, ANSELMO $1,553.79 PRINCIPAL, $83.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,637.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT REVELO, ANSELMO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGEMENT FILE ASSIGNEE, DAVID CHURCH DBA CHRISTOPHER BURTON LTD 650-359-7276, 735 HICKEY BLVD, #173 PACIFICA, CA.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC ASSIGNED TO RANDOLPH BUSH DBA ASSURED JUDGMENT RECOVERY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,482.98 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT REVELO, ANSELMO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT REVELO, ANSELMO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT REVELO, ANSELMO
